title: Clair de Lune Moses Basket Fibre Mattress, Hypo-Allergenic Baby Bassinet Mattresses (Palm Basket 74 x 28 cm)
features: MADE TO FIT: Tailored to fit any Moses Basket with base dimensions of 74 x 28 cm, check the size of your Moses basket before purchasing.

PREMIUM MATERIALS: Made from two-thirds recycled polyester, the mattress is crafted with sustainable high-density polyester fibre. This ensures support, comfort, and hypo-allergenic protection, reducing the risk of allergic reactions.

REMOVABLE EASY-CARE COVER: The mattress boasts a removable, machine-washable spun-bond polypropylene cover. It's also highly moisture-resistant and can withstand high temperatures. This durability ensures a hygienic sleeping environment.
ENHANCED SLEEP QUALITY: Promoting better rest, this durable mattress features breathable fibres that help regulate your baby's temperature, ensuring their comfort throughout the night.

TRUSTED NURSERY SPECIALISTS: Clair de Lune is an award-winning provider of Moses Baskets and baby essentials, committed to supporting new parents and babies with the promise of a good night’s sleep. Our mattresses are made in Britain and conform to British safety standards.
description: From the brand Previous page Crafted in Great Britain We design & craft baby bedding & nursery accessories in Great Britain, using skilled local artisans in our Manchester-based factory. For over 80 years, Clair de Lune has proudly been the UK's trusted name in baby essentials. Our passion lies in offering quality baby products, including Moses baskets, mattresses, cribs, & accessories, all crafted with your baby's safety and comfort as our priority. Every piece is carefully made using the finest materials, showcasing our unwavering dedication to quality. We're committed to ensuring your baby enjoys peaceful and restful sleep. What we do best Visit the store Next page

product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: • A durable, breathable mattress to regulate temperature., • Water-resistant cover that is removable & washable., • Sustainable choice, made from recycled polyester., • Fits Clair de Lune Palm Moses baskets & Noah Pods.
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep away from heat and open flames. Do not expose to direct sunlight. Remove packaging before use. Always use a fitted sheet designed for Moses baskets. Do not machine wash. Spot clean only with mild detergent and cold water. Keep out of reach of children and pets when not in use.
